summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Fixed missing target_station field in MenuItem and OrderItem models. Frontend: Customer page dark theme verified, item detail modal working, orders panel working. Admin menu management page accessible but session persistence issues prevented full UI testing of station selector dropdown.

bugs_fixed.issue: MenuItem and MenuItemCreate models missing target_station field
bugs_fixed.fix: Added target_station: str = 'kitchen' to both models
Added target_station: str = 'kitchen' to OrderItem model

critical_code_review_comments: Backend target_station field now properly saved and returned in menu items API
Orders correctly populate target_station from menu item when created
Kitchen orders endpoint correctly filters by station parameter
Customer page has modern dark theme with navy/dark blue gradient background
Item detail modal shows item name, description, price, and preparation time
Orders panel shows bill summary with service charge calculation

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Customer page verified, admin menu management accessible

seed_data_creation: Test menu items created with target_station field (TEST_Kitchen_Item, TEST_Bar_Item, TEST_Update_Station) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features tested: 1) GET /api/stations returns default stations (kitchen, bar, waiter) - PASS, 2) POST/PUT /api/menu-items with target_station - PASS (after fix), 3) POST /api/orders populates target_station from menu item - PASS (after fix), 4) GET /api/orders/kitchen?station=X filters correctly - PASS, 5) Customer page dark theme - PASS, 6) Item detail modal - PASS, 7) Admin menu management page accessible with PIN verification. Note: admin1 PIN is 1234, emin PIN is 5159.

features_tested.stations_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/stations returns kitchen, bar, waiter
features_tested.order_target_station_population: PASS - Orders get target_station from menu item
features_tested.customer_item_detail_modal: PASS - Shows name, description, price, prep time
features_tested.customer_orders_panel: PASS - Shows orders with bill summary
features_tested.admin_menu_management: PARTIAL - Page accessible, station selector present in code

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/orders - PASS (populates target_station from menu item)
